_comment: a_plus_pressures variant with mse_mu_plus_sigma KD (lambda_sigma=5.0). Mode A reseeds Stage 3 only; default seed 99 matches the diagnostic single-seed run.

single.description: One seed, full Stage 1->2->3 anchor_off only.

A.description: Stage 3 reseeded across config.seeds; Stage 1/2 trained once and shared.
